column1: # grep-tells.tsv — TIER 1 (flat-presence) rules for audit-swiftui-adaptive-navigation (nav-01 … nav-12).
# severity: hard | warn | adv   (hard → runner exits 2). The runner greps each ERE over the target *.swift.
# This LOCATES only — the LLM agent READS each hit (SKILL.md step 3) and decides. The one structural rule
# grep cannot express (a 3-col NavigationSplitView whose content: closure is just EmptyView() — nav-03)
# lives in ast-grep/*.yml (tier 2). nav-04 (boolean+frame column-hide) and nav-08 (columnWidth INSIDE the
# detail: closure) are kept here as grep tells, READ-confirmed, because neither makes a clean ast-grep rule
# without heavy false positives (see ast-grep/nav-03-empty-middle-column.yml NOTE). nav-05 (.topBar*
# placements) is RETIRED on iOS — those placements are CORRECT (introduced_ios 14.0, not deprecated) — so
# there is intentionally no nav-05 tell here. Full ❌→✅ + sources: ../references/*.md (routed from SKILL.md).

column4: NavigationView is DEPRECATED (migrate_to NavigationStack) → NavigationStack (push shell) / NavigationSplitView (iPad sidebar). cross_ref api-currency (nav-01, fix_mode: auto)
navigationBarTitle is DEPRECATED → .navigationTitle (KEEP navigationBarTitleDisplayMode — iOS-only and current) (nav-07, fix_mode: auto)
ToolbarSpacer/SpacerSizing is iOS 26.0+ — REPORT only if deployment target < iOS 26 (read in ORIENT); else verify it is gated #available(iOS 26, *) (nav-11)

NavigationSplitView — if it is UNCONDITIONAL (no horizontalSizeClass / userInterfaceIdiom gate) on a Universal/iPhone target it collapses oddly on iPhone → gate to regular width or use NavigationStack. READ the whole file for a size-class branch; an iPad-only target is fine. cross_ref adaptive-layout (nav-02)
NavigationSplitView — if a 3-col init(sidebar:content:detail:) has an EmptyView()/placeholder content:, use the 2-col init(sidebar:detail:). READ the closures (nav-03)
a .frame(...width: 0) — if it collapses a column driven by a boolean instead of a columnVisibility binding, that is a frame hack (nav-04). READ for the NavigationSplitView context
navigationSplitViewColumnWidth — SILENT no-op on the DETAIL column; constrains leading columns only. For a contextual panel use .inspector. UNVERIFIED — verify against Xcode 26 SDK (nav-08)
a sidebar List(selection:) — if it is the NavigationSplitView (iPad) sidebar and lacks .listStyle(.sidebar), the material/selection highlight is wrong (nav-09)
.searchable — put it on the NavigationStack/NavigationSplitView, not on a column, or it lands in the wrong bar slot (nav-10)
detail: closure — an empty/blank detail should be ContentUnavailableView, the native empty-state component (nav-12). READ the closure body
